meanings.definition: apply to a wrong thing or person; apply badly or incorrectly
examples: The words are misapplied in this context
You are misapplying the name of this religious group

meanings.definition: change the inherent purpose or function of something
examples: The director of the factory misused the funds intended for the health care of his workers

meanings.definition: used incorrectly or carelessly or for an improper purpose
examples: misused words are often laughable but one weeps for misused talents
